name: Beer Bread#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a loaf pan.
2. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.  Or use regular flour, 3½ teaspoons baking powder, and 1½ teaspoons salt. This is the only simple recipe I know and it happens to be the one you want. I think this is one of the only breads you can't mess up on.
